title: Kanban view - divided by Project
excerpt:
Hi Folks, 
Does anyone know of a good way to divide kanban views up into vertical srim lanes on the basis of project?  Currently can only divide by group, but would prefer to divide by a linked field to our project listi…

posts.author: clm (Carl Morley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Folks,
Does anyone know of a good way to divide kanban views up into vertical srim lanes on the basis of project? Currently can only divide by group, but would prefer to divide by a linked field to our project listing. This would allow us to see all our projects on one page and work down through them at team meetings. Any suggestions?
Cheers,
Carl.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @clm, good question! At the moment the only way to divide kanban views vertically is on the basis of group. The way to go here might be to make a “high-level board” with a group per project or to show status information in a different way (such as in a battery widget on a dashboard). What do you think?

posts.author: kerstyn (Kerstyn)
posts.cookedHtml: There is a feature request for a kanban widget for the dashboards here Kanban View Across Multiple Boards

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
